productDisplayName: Puma Men Navy Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Style Note German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt from Puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This piece's crush-worthy colour and stylish cut is an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Product Details Navy blue and red polo neck t-shirt with a white spread collar, chest button placket, short sleeves with branding on the left sleeves and ribbed cuffs, applique on the left chest, brand tab on the left hem and a vented hem Material and Care Shell: 100% cotton  Trimming: 100% cotton Machine wash cool water Do not bleach; dry clean Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
